description_long: This ornate sconce features a central stem with a decorative finial at the top, from which six elegantly curved arms radiate outward. Each arm supports a lampshade, likely made of frosted or translucent glass, and is adorned with intricate leaf and vine motifs that wrap around the structure. The arms and central body appear to be crafted from polished metal, possibly brass or chrome, giving the fixture a refined and luxurious appearance. The overall design is symmetrical, with the arms evenly spaced and the decorative elements providing a sense of movement and organic flow. The fixture is suspended from a ceiling mount, indicating it is intended for overhead installation. The combination of glass and metal, along with the detailed ornamentation, suggests a classic or vintage-inspired aesthetic suitable for upscale urban interiors.
description: An ornate, multi-arm ceiling sconce with six glass-shaded bulbs and intricate metal leaf and vine decorations, suspended from a decorative ceiling mount.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six glass shades and the symmetrical arrangement of the ornate metal arms and decorative motifs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the arms and the layered arrangement of the leaf and vine decorations.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with all six shades visible and the central stem and finial clearly seen.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the curvature and spacing of the arms and decorative elements.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture exhibits a vintage, ornate design with classical influences, featuring elaborate leaf and vine motifs and a polished metallic finish. Its symmetrical, multi-arm structure and decorative glass shades evoke a sense of elegance and sophistication.
